purpose: Isolate whether same-condition checkpoint restart (segmenting) perturbs tau_100_max/tau_mean_max, independent of fidelity. 17.5 RPM, fidelity=9 (matches existing L9 single-shot baseline run_id=44133566), 4 segments mirroring L10 17.5 RPM chain structure exactly (t_end/t_checkpoint copied from L10 template run_ids 61d53bc5/7c00faee/1986b360/80c3f213), omega_b_prev never set (same-condition restart only, no cross-condition warm-start).
